claim: Apply the analogical structure in atom ATOM_T010_S021_ANA_02 ("like to change my weights to absorb that bit of the data. And some other copy...") to the open problem framed in atom ATOM_T003_S002_OPE_02 ("These are unsolved problems that are just available for people to solve and m...").
